products.name: NexCharge 3-Port Fast USB Wall Charger (Compact & Universal)
products.hook: Acha deal hai. 3 devices charge karo, ek socket se, seedha power up!
products.pain: Hostel mein limited sockets, aur tumhare paas phone, power bank, earbuds... sab charge karna hai?
products.fix: This compact 3-port USB charger is a lifesaver. Charge all your essentials simultaneously from a single wall socket. No more fighting for plugs or carrying multiple bulky adapters. It’s practical, efficient, and a must-have for every student.
products.loot_reason: This type of charger generally costs ₹1500, but is available for ₹399 right now. Very practical for hostel living.

products.name: Lumitech Portable USB Rechargeable LED Book Light with Clip (Warm & Cool Tones)
products.hook: Bhai ye price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 Hostel light issues, SOLVED!
products.pain: Raat bhar padhna hai par roommates light off kar dete hain? Ya library mein bhi focus nahi ban raha?
products.fix: This tiny, rechargeable book light clips onto anything – your book, laptop, or bed frame – giving you perfect focused light without disturbing anyone. Multiple brightness and color modes (warm/cool) make it super versatile. Don't let darkness stop your grind!
products.loot_reason: Usually ₹900 ke upar milta hai, abhi ₹229 mein! Isse sasta aur useful kuch nahi milega for hostel life.

products.name: Fotonova Mini RGB USB LED Strip Light with Remote (1 Meter)
products.hook: Desk setup glow-up under ₹150? Impossible, right?! 🤩
products.pain: Your study desk looks bland, and you want that cool vibe without breaking the bank?
products.fix: This USB-powered RGB strip light transforms any boring desk into a vibrant study zone. Easy to install, remote-controlled, and instantly makes your space feel premium. Perfect for late-night study sessions or gaming breaks!
products.loot_reason: Usually ₹600+ ka milta hai, abhi ₹149 hai! RGB dreams on a student budget, this deal won't last!
